---
title: "levenberg_marquardt"
generated: true
description: "Levenberg-Marquardt minimisation of $ tfrac{1}{2} lVert r(x) rVert^2$."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.linalg.optimize`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:levenberg_marquardt -->
```python
levenberg_marquardt(residual_fn: ResidualFn, x0: Float[Array, ' p'], *, n_iters: int = 20, init_lambda: float = 0.001, lambda_up: float = 10.0, lambda_down: float = 0.1, cg_tol: float = 1e-06, cg_maxiter: Optional[int] = None, jacobian: JacobianStrategy = 'auto', jacobian_fn: Optional[ResidualFn] = None, early_stop: Optional[tuple[float, int]] = None) -> OptimizeResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:levenberg_marquardt -->
Levenberg-Marquardt minimisation of
$\tfrac{1}{2}\lVert r(x)\rVert^2$.

Each step solves the damped normal equations
$(J^{\top}J + \lambda I)\,\delta = -J^{\top}r$ and accepts
$x + \delta$ only if the objective decreases; $\lambda$
shrinks on accept (toward Gauss-Newton) and grows on reject (toward
gradient descent).  The accept/reject branch is a `jnp.where` and the
iteration is a `lax.scan`, so the whole solve stays `jit` /
`grad`-friendly and compiles in roughly constant time in `n_iters`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:levenberg_marquardt -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `residual_fn` | `ResidualFn` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | As [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd). |
| `x0` | `Float` | `p` | ‚Äî | As [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd). |
| `n_iters` | `int` | ‚Äî | `20` | Number of LM steps (each is one trial step + accept/reject). |
| `init_lambda` | `float` | ‚Äî | `0.001` | Initial damping $\lambda$. |
| `lambda_up` | `float` | ‚Äî | `10.0` | Multiplicative $\lambda$ adjustment on reject / accept. |
| `lambda_down` | `float` | ‚Äî | `0.1` | Multiplicative $\lambda$ adjustment on reject / accept. |
| `cg_tol` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-06` | As [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd). |
| `cg_maxiter` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | As [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd). |
| `jacobian` | `JacobianStrategy` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | As [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd). |
| `jacobian_fn` | `Optional[ResidualFn]` | ‚Äî | `None` | As [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd). |
| `early_stop` | `Optional[tuple[float, int]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Opt-in early-exit `(threshold, window)` -- as [`gauss_newton`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize/gauss_newton.qmd) (default `None` keeps the fixed `lax.scan`). |

**Returns** `OptimizeResult`. The minimiser and its cost trace; the `cost_history` is monotone-decreasing (guaranteed by the accept/reject rule).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:levenberg_marquardt -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
